operation: Cut and drill steel bracket replacement
warnings: Wear eye protection during cutting, drilling, and cleanup.
Validate fit with a low-stakes prototype before structural testing.
Treat any vendor handoff as staged until explicit approval is given.
Review the operation before running anything that throws debris, dust, or fumes.
required_interlocks: manual review before live machine run
recommendation: Proceed only after the listed interlocks are satisfied.
